description_long: This is a large, ultra-wide curved computer monitor with a sleek, modern design. The front features a vibrant, high-resolution display with a blue digital pattern, framed by a thin, matte black bezel. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, V-shaped stand that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle matte finish and a central mounting point for the stand. The side views reveal the pronounced curvature of the screen and the slim profile of the display panel. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are apparent from any angle.
description: A large, ultra-wide curved computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a V-shaped stand, featuring a vibrant blue display and a sleek, modern profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expansive curved screen, thin bezel, and vibrant blue digital display.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pronounced curvature and slim profile of the monitor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, matte back panel and the central attachment of the V-shaped stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the curved screen and thin depth of the monitor.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and uniform in thickness, with slightly rounded corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: V-shaped stand made of matte black material, wide-set legs for stability, with a central support column connecting to the rear of the monitor; no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
